title: quinaria neilgherrensis
intro: Quinaria neilgherrensis, a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Quinaria neilgherrensis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Quinaria neilgherrensis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
